a.xlink:title: An animation that moves a single LED back and forth (Larson Scanner effect)
Fx2dTo1d samples a 2D effect into a 1D LED strip using a ScreenMap.
Power-based particle system for 1D LED strips creating organic light effects.
Abstract base class for 2D flow field effects.
Effect wrapper that upscales delegate effects using bilinear interpolation.

Pure fixed-point (s16x16) flow field implementation for maximum speed.
